mapper.select: SELECT FROM departments ORDER BY name ASC
SELECT FROM departments WHERE is_active = TRUE ORDER BY name ASC
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM departments WHERE name = #{name})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM departments WHERE name = #{name} AND department_id != #{departmentId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO departments (name, is_active, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{isActive}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE departments SET name = #{name}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE department_id = #{departmentId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE department = #{name} AND is_active = TRUE
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET department = #{newName}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE department = #{oldName}
UPDATE attendance_department_approvers SET department_name = #{newName}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE department_name = #{oldName}
UPDATE work_schedule_classes SET section_name = #{newName}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE section_name = #{oldName}
